testcase.name: An SDP offer is relayed to another participant

error.message:
Handshake status 404 Not Found -+-+- {'connection': 'Keep-Alive', 'server': 'Embedthis-http', 'cache-control': 'no-cache', 'date': 'Mon, 06 Apr 2026 16:04:47 GMT', 'content-length': '173', 'keep-alive': 'timeout=60, max=199'} -+-+- b' Not Found

Access Error: 404 -- Not Found

Cannot open document for: /room
'

testcase.error:

websocket._exceptions.WebSocketBadStatusException: Handshake status 404 Not Found -+-+- {'connection': 'Keep-Alive', 'server': 'Embedthis-http', 'cache-control': 'no-cache', 'date': 'Mon, 06 Apr 2026 16:04:47 GMT', 'content-length': '173', 'keep-alive': 'timeout=60, max=199'} -+-+- b'\r\nNot Found\r\n\r\n

\r\n

\r\n\r\n\r\n'
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin Scenario: An SDP offer is relayed to another participant Given a unique room alias "call_room" ... passed in 0.001s And WebSocket client "alice" is connected ... error in 0.007s And WebSocket client "bob" is connected ... skipped in 0.000s And client "alice" joins room "call_room" with a generated libsodium-style public key ... skipped in 0.000s And client "bob" joins room "call_room" with a generated libsodium-style public key ... skipped in 0.000s When client "alice" sends signaling action "OFFER" with JSON payload ... skipped in 0.000s """ { "type": "offer", "sdp": "dummy-offer-sdp" } """ Then the response for client "alice" should contain ... skipped in 0.000s | field | value | | status | 0 | | message | Signal call dispatched successfully | And client "bob" should receive a "SignalCallRelay" event containing ... skipped in 0.000s | field | value | | action | OFFER | | sender_uuid | alice | | data.type | offer | | data.sdp | dummy-offer-sdp |
@scenario.end --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
